seoTitle: Timor West vs Tinamba West — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Timor West and Tinamba West. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Timor West vs Tinamba West: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Timor West and Tinamba West.
heading: Timor West vs Tinamba West — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Timor West, Victoria and Tinamba West, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Timor West has a lower overall climate risk score (33/100) compared to Tinamba West (37/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Timor West or Tinamba West safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Timor West has a flood risk score of 26/100, while Tinamba West scores 51/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Timor West scores 25/100 for bushfire risk. Tinamba West scores 53/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Timor West or Tinamba West?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Timor West has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.1% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
